title: Hippeastrum blumenavia

It is native to Brazil and is also known as the 'Queen of the Night' due to its nocturnal blooming habit. Hippeastrum blumenavia is a terrestrial plant that thrives in warm and humid environments. Its classification also indicates its close relationship to other Amaryllidaceae species in terms of morphology and genetics.
